nasb.text: Thus you are to know in your heart that the Lord your God was disciplining you just as a man disciplines his son.

esv.text: Know then in your heart that, as a man disciplines his son, the Lord your God disciplines you.

cnv.text: 因此你心裡要明白，耶和華你的　神管教你，好像人管教他的兒子一樣。

ccb.text: 你们心里要明白，你们的上帝耶和华管教你们，如同父亲管教儿子。
